title: Reverse Linked List II
input_format: The head of a singly linked list and two integers `left` and `right`.
output_format: The head of the list after reversing nodes from position `left` to position `right`.
constraints:
- The number of nodes in the list is `n`.
- `1 <= n <= 500`
- `-500 <= Node.val <= 500`
- `1 <= left <= right <= n`
function_signature: function reverseBetween(head: ListNode | null, left: number, right: number): ListNode | null {}
